card.$description: Card component tokens — surface, padding, border, shadow
card.$$_softSurface: _____ CONTENT-SURFACE RADII — collapsed onto the single tight scale (radius consolidation) _____

radiusSm.$description: Content-surface small radius (8px = rounded-md). Collapsed onto the single tight scale — was a parallel 10px soft scale. Used by hero, work tiles, contact inputs.

radiusMd.$description: Content-surface medium radius (12px = rounded-lg). Default for content card surfaces. Was 14px.

radiusLg.$description: Content-surface large radius (16px = rounded-xl). For larger touch targets + CTAs. Was 20px.
